title: Peer Review Writing
description: How to review an academic manuscript: strengths, major concerns, minor concerns, recommendation.
summary_pt_br: Peer review: resumo, preocupações maiores, menores, recomendação. Específico e gentil.

scenes.subtitle_en: How to review an academic manuscript: strengths, major concerns, minor concerns, recommendation.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Peer review: resumo, preocupações maiores, menores, recomendação. Específico e gentil.

scenes.text_en: How to review an academic manuscript: strengths, major concerns, minor concerns, recommendation. Focus: peer review writing. The manuscript addresses an important and timely question.
scenes.text_pt: Peer review: resumo, preocupações maiores, menores, recomendação. Específico e gentil. Foco: peer review writing. O manuscrito aborda uma questão importante e atual.

scenes.title: Peer Review Writing
scenes.body_en: Structure: SUMMARY (one paragraph). MAJOR CONCERNS (fundamental issues). MINOR CONCERNS (details). RECOMMENDATION (accept/revise/reject). Be specific, be kind.
scenes.body_pt: Peer review: resumo, preocupações maiores, menores, recomendação. Específico e gentil.

examples.en: The manuscript addresses an important and timely question.
examples.pt: O manuscrito aborda uma questão importante e atual.

examples.en: My major concern is the sample size of twelve.
examples.pt: Minha principal preocupação é o tamanho amostral de doze.

examples.en: I recommend major revisions before resubmission.
examples.pt: Recomendo revisões maiores antes de reenvio.

exercise.question: Complete: "The ___ addresses an important and timely question."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The manuscript addresses an important and timely question."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O manuscrito aborda uma questão importante e atual.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
My major concern is the sample size of twelve.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "My major concern is the sample size of twelve."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Minha principal preocupação é o tamanho amostral de doze.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Peer Review Writing — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre peer review writing. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, open your review with a summary.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The manuscript addresses a timely question.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Sample size is too small to generalize.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The core idea is worth pursuing carefully.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good reviews improve science without discouraging scientists.

scenes.title: The review session
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the review structure. Use at least three review terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On Saturday morning, Kumar walked three doctoral students through how to write their first academic peer review.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Open with a fair summary — one paragraph that proves you read and understood the manuscript completely.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: And my major concern about sample size — should that come before or after the minor concerns?

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Major concerns always come first. Minor concerns are details the authors can address in a single revision round.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: My recommendation is major revisions — should I still close with something encouraging about the core idea?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Good peer review, Kumar taught, improves science without discouraging the scientist — the hardest balance in academia.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Peer Review Writing". How to review an academic manuscript: strengths, major concerns, minor concerns, recommendation. The manuscript addresses an important and timely question. My major concern is the sample size of twelve. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Peer Review Writing". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Peer Review Writing".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Peer Review Writing".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
